copy.manifestoBody: This site is organized as a world rather than a brochure. Each route has its own role, pacing, and atmosphere, but they all resolve back to one identity.
copy.featureTitle: Work that feels structured, atmospheric, and technically grounded.
copy.featureDescription: Featured projects are presented as world artifacts rather than generic portfolio cards.
copy.ctaTitle: Available for product design engineering, frontend systems, and premium web experiences.

galaxy.title: A navigable galaxy of work, life, systems, and reflective worlds.
galaxy.description: Drag the galaxy, let it rotate, and enter each world through its own orbit instead of through a flat list of sections.
galaxy.dragHint: Drag the galaxy, pick a system, then use the planets list on the right to follow or enter.

scene.title: A world built as a living system of themes, pages, and settings.
scene.description: The first galaxy controls world tone. Inner orbits control pages and language. Drag the whole field, let it revolve, and enter through motion instead of a static landing page.
scene.dragHint: Drag to rotate the field. Themes are the outer galaxy.
scene.themeGalaxyDescription: These planets change the whole world's atmosphere, palette, and transition behavior.
scene.pageGalaxyDescription: These moons enter specific pages inside the active world system.
scene.settingsGalaxyDescription: These satellites control language and re-entry without leaving the scene.
scene.memoryGalaxyDescription: This background galaxy carries echoes, archive fragments, and ritual traces to make the universe feel lived in.
scene.darkToneDescription: Amber-on-zinc contrast, dense night depth, and a more distilled technical darkness.
scene.languageGalaxyDescription: Switch language without leaving the scene
scene.freeNavigationDesc: Drag the galaxy, choose a system, then use the list on the right to follow or enter a planet

premium.title: Premium but personal
premium.description: Not portfolio-as-marketing, but a curated world with tone, memory, and systems.

editorial.title: Editorial and technical
editorial.description: Long-form voice, careful hierarchy, and implementation detail living in the same system.

layered.title: Layered, not cluttered
layered.description: Each route has a role, a mood, and a clearer place in the larger personal world.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Who I am, what I study, how I think, and the tone behind the work.

work.title: Work
work.description: Curated project systems, selected builds, and the engineering behind them.

records.title: Records
records.description: Fragments, notes, moments, and the human texture around the technical life.

experience.title: Experience
experience.description: Highlighted arcs, selected outcomes, and the credibility structure underneath the world.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: A calm place to start a conversation when the brief deserves care.

corporate.title: Corporate sky
corporate.description: Open blue light, gliding motion, and cleaner directional contrast.

forest.title: Forest canopy
forest.description: Organic depth, softer green air, and slower breathing transitions.

wine.title: Wine editorial
wine.description: Dense red warmth, curved highlights, and richer cinematic restraint.

cosmic.title: Cosmic field
cosmic.description: Deeper night contrast, orbital signals, and more dramatic spatial depth.

wheat.title: Wheat archive
wheat.description: Warm paper light, quieter contrast, and a calmer archival reading mood.
